applicability_and_failure_conditions.applicability: Requires causal observed Low, Volume history with at least 61 rows of lookback.
applicability_and_failure_conditions.failure_conditions: Undefined denominators, incomplete required history, non-finite inputs, or an asset outside the point-in-time membership mask invalidate the score.
applicability_and_failure_conditions.predevelopment_evidence_scope: Interventions and shape evidence use the frozen 2021 validation period; multi-year return, cost, and regime stability are assessed only after the single development opening and are not causal evidence.

negative_edge.shape_semantics: Exact analytic primitive response over a dimensionless input-ratio grid; the edge contribution includes the terminal Sub sign.

positive_edge.shape_semantics: Exact analytic primitive response over a dimensionless input-ratio grid; the edge contribution includes the terminal Sub sign.

card.one_sentence_mechanism: The positive edge favors stronger recent price continuation measured on Low over 2 trading days, while the negative edge subtracts change in trading activity and investor attention measured on Volume over 60 trading days; it may work when that cross-sectional imbalance captures persistent price pressure, reversal, or attention not already represented by the subtracted leg.

card.one_sentence_mechanism: The positive edge favors stronger abnormal trading activity relative to its local norm measured on Volume over 10 trading days, while the negative edge subtracts recent price continuation measured on Open over 3 trading days; it may work when that cross-sectional imbalance captures persistent price pressure, reversal, or attention not already represented by the subtracted leg.

applicability_and_failure_conditions.applicability: Requires causal observed Close history with at least 20 rows of lookback.
applicability_and_failure_conditions.failure_conditions: Undefined denominators, incomplete required history, non-finite inputs, or an asset outside the point-in-time membership mask invalidate the score.
applicability_and_failure_conditions.predevelopment_evidence_scope: Interventions and shape evidence use the frozen 2021 validation period; multi-year return, cost, and regime stability are assessed only after the single development opening and are not causal evidence.

negative_edge.shape_semantics: Exact analytic primitive response over a dimensionless input-ratio grid; the edge contribution includes the terminal Sub sign.

positive_edge.shape_semantics: Exact analytic primitive response over a dimensionless input-ratio grid; the edge contribution includes the terminal Sub sign.

card.one_sentence_mechanism: The positive edge favors stronger mean-reversion pressure from the current price gap measured on Close over 20 trading days, while the negative edge subtracts mean-reversion pressure from the current price gap measured on Close over 2 trading days; it may work when that cross-sectional imbalance captures persistent price pressure, reversal, or attention not already represented by the subtracted leg.

applicability_and_failure_conditions.applicability: Requires causal observed Close, Low history with at least 10 rows of lookback.
applicability_and_failure_conditions.failure_conditions: Undefined denominators, incomplete required history, non-finite inputs, or an asset outside the point-in-time membership mask invalidate the score.
applicability_and_failure_conditions.predevelopment_evidence_scope: Interventions and shape evidence use the frozen 2021 validation period; multi-year return, cost, and regime stability are assessed only after the single development opening and are not causal evidence.

negative_edge.shape_semantics: Exact analytic primitive response over a dimensionless input-ratio grid; the edge contribution includes the terminal Sub sign.

positive_edge.shape_semantics: Exact analytic primitive response over a dimensionless input-ratio grid; the edge contribution includes the terminal Sub sign.

card.one_sentence_mechanism: The positive edge favors stronger recent price continuation measured on Low over 2 trading days, while the negative edge subtracts price extension relative to its rolling mean measured on Close over 10 trading days; it may work when that cross-sectional imbalance captures persistent price pressure, reversal, or attention not already represented by the subtracted leg.
